description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden chest of drawers with a rich, dark brown finish and a slightly weathered appearance. The front features six equally sized drawers arranged in two columns, each adorned with a recessed metal handle. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain and subtle patina visible throughout, giving it a classic, utilitarian look. The base has four short, sturdy feet, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. This piece would be well-suited for use in urban environments such as apartment entryways, garages, or community spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden chest of drawers with six recessed-handled drawers and a broad, flat top. It has a classic, sturdy design with a slightly weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with recessed metal handles and a broad, flat top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden panel and the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with visible grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side.
